NEW 2025Best Seller Electric

EV-Pro® 48V
Commercial Kart

Our flagship electric commercial go kart — engineered for high-throughput rental operations with zero emissions, ultra-low noise, and industry-leading battery runtime. The preferred choice for indoor venues, resorts, and eco-conscious operators worldwide.

Motor Power
3.5
kW Peak
Battery
48V
LiFePO4
Runtime
4–6
Hours/Charge
Max Speed
45
km/h
Request Quote Download Spec Sheet
Features

Built for Commercial Performance

Every component of the EV-Pro® 48V is engineered for maximum uptime and minimal maintenance in a commercial rental environment.

LiFePO4 Battery Pack

Safe, long-lasting lithium iron phosphate battery chemistry with 2,000+ charge cycle life.

Steel Safety Chassis

CNC-bent 32mm steel tube frame with integrated side impact protection and roll hoop.

Adjustable Speed Limiter

Operator-programmable max speed profiles for different rider skill levels and venue requirements.

Regenerative Braking

Recovers kinetic energy on deceleration, extending range and reducing brake wear by up to 40%.

Adult & Junior Variants

Available in full adult size and junior configuration with reduced dimensions and speed range.

Fleet Management Ready

Pre-wired for timing system integration and fleet management software compatibility.

Full Specifications

Technical Spec Sheet

SpecificationValue
Chassis MaterialCNC-Bent 32mm Steel Tube
Motor TypeBrushless DC Hub Motor
Motor Power (Peak)3.5 kW
Battery ChemistryLiFePO4 (Lithium Iron Phosphate)
Battery Voltage48V
Battery Capacity30 Ah
Charge Time3–4 Hours (Standard) / 1.5 Hours (Fast)
Runtime per Charge4–6 Hours (continuous operation)
Maximum Speed45 km/h (adjustable)
Braking SystemDisc Brake (Rear) + Regenerative
Overall Length1,820 mm
Overall Width720 mm
Weight165 kg
Max Rider Weight120 kg
Warranty12 Months Chassis / 6 Months Drivetrain
